name: PT Erajaya Swasembada Tbk
summary: PT Erajaya Swasembada Tbk imports, distributes, and retails mobile telecommunication products in Indonesia. The company offers mobile phones and tablets, subscriber identity module cards, prepaid mobile vouchers, accessories, Internet of Things devices, and Google Play gift cards; computers and other electronic devices; and trades in medical equipment, as well as provides value added services, including mobile phones protection and cellphone leasing services. It also engages in information technology system; management consulting; outsourcing; and property businesses. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in West Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Erajaya Swasembada Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Eralink International.
